caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with the text "BOSS TALK" in gold letters is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional microphone attached to a black boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring the word "HUSTLE" accompanied by stars. Above him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table to his right sits a black mug with red and white text that includes "TALK OUT". In the lower-left corner, a small logo is visible. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his gaze and expression. He begins by looking towards someone off-screen to his left with a slight smile, then shifts his head and facial expression as if reacting to a conversation, with his mouth opening slightly in the final frame.
